title: EDL section in Settings panel with enable toggle and Strength/Radius sliders
capture_instructions: Settings tab open. Scroll to the EDL section. EDL toggle is ON. Both Strength slider (at ~0.5) and Radius slider (at ~2) are visible below the toggle. Sidebar fills left 240px of the frame. Capture enough vertical height to show all three controls: toggle, Strength slider, Radius slider.
ui_state: Settings tab, EDL section expanded, EDL enabled, Strength = 0.5, Radius = 2
